text.title: Spec Writing Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Spec Writing end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, and output.

step.name: draft
step.action: Fill 7 sections; cap at one page.

step.name: review
step.action: Assign ≥1 reviewer; capture feedback in open-questions.

step.name: sign-off
step.action: Resolve open questions or carry as risks; author + reviewer sign.
